# deviceBrowser(_:didRemove:moreGoing:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the delegate that a device has been removed.

## Declaration

```swift
func deviceBrowser(_ browser: ICDeviceBrowser, didRemove device: ICDevice, moreGoing: Bool)
```

## Discussion

If several devices are removed at the same time, then this message is sent once for each device with the value of `moreGoing` set to `true` in each message except the last one.

## Adding and Removing Devices

- **deviceBrowser(_:didAdd:moreComing:)**: Tells the delegate that a device has been added.
- **deviceBrowserDidEnumerateLocalDevices(_:)**: Tells the delegate that the device browser has completed sending [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceBrowserDelegate/deviceBrowser(_:didAdd:moreComing:)] for all local devices.
